message: Awesome! Constructing meals from ingredient products and the nutrition for generic items were what I missed most about OpenNutriTracker

Excellent app well done, I'm very happy with it. If I could make one feature request it's that for the custom recipes I'd like to be able to specify the macros myself without needing to add an off the shelf item. I've already lost some weight with your help, thank you so much.
Thank you for making such a good app!
Since my other free app went premium, i came here still finding my way in the app but first imression is good.
